instruction: In Finder, set the Spotlight comment of ~/Documents/{FILE} to {COMMENT}.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5); Tier-C AppleScript reads the Finder comment back

args: mkdir -p "$HOME/Documents"; : > "$HOME/Documents/{FILE}"; osascript -e 'on run argv' -e 'tell application "Finder" to set comment of (POSIX file (item 1 of argv) as alias) to ""' -e 'end run' "$HOME/Documents/{FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true

osascript -e 'on run argv' -e 'tell application "Finder" to set comment of (POSIX file (item 1 of argv) as alias) to (item 2 of argv)' -e 'end run' "$HOME/Documents/{FILE}" "{COMMENT}" 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "Finder" to return comment of (POSIX file "/Users/tmc/Documents/{FILE}" as alias)
